repo.name: scheduling-bridge
repo.description: Remote automation service: Acuity browser automation, Playwright orchestration, and remote HTTP endpoints for services/availability/slots/booking/health; published from the Bazel //:pkg artifact.

sbom.notes: scheduling-bridge enrollment dimensions (TIN-2110 canary): forge scope = Jesssullivan personal account; operator overlay = jesssullivan-infra; execution pool = tinyland-nix (in-cluster ARC); substrate mode = shared-cache-backed (cache-first, TIN-1997 Option D). The bridge canary keeps runner_mode: shared (the variable under test). The Bazel cache endpoint is injected at runtime by the in-cluster nix-setup (never baked); enrollment is self-verified via scripts/cache-attachment-contract.sh --strict. Cache-first only: no remote executor / REAPI lane is wired.
